description: Case dimensions: 30 mm x 25 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: rectangularWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSteel strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and styleBlack coloured dial with brand logo at the 3 hour mark, date display at the 4 hour mark and the branding  at the 9 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
